steps.name: Ensure all partitions are disarmed before test
Wait for selector getByText(/SELECT ALL|DESELECT ALL/).first()
Wait for selector locator('button').filter({ hasText: 'ARM HOME' }).first()
Verify partition shows Armed Home
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Armed Home', { exact: true }).first()
